Thunderhoof Quiver  
 


WT: 0.4 Weight Reduction: 33%
Capacity: 4 Size Capacity: MEDIUM
Thunderhoof Quiver

WT: 0.4 Weight Reduction: 33%
Capacity: 4 Size Capacity: MEDIUM

Item Type:Container
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:5
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 03:18:55
Page Updated:Fri Oct 16th, 2009

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

South Karana
NPC Name
Kroldir Thunderhoof

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Crescent Reach (Removed)
Quest Name
Container Tokens

The Bazaar (Removed)
Quest Name
Container Tokens

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
South Karana
Allows you to store and draw more arrows through the ammo slot.


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Updated January 20th, 2026
Send a correction

Post Comment
monster who drops this quiver
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2009 at 6:10 AM Rating: Decent
zippergut
View User Forum
Sage
208 posts
This quiver is dropped by Kroldir Thunderhoof.

-- Ryllian, 67 Elf Ranger of Quellious
▲ Page top
Thunderhoof Quiver
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2003 at 7:35 PM Rating: Default
ChadBees
18 posts
ran througk SK omw to LR tracked an unknown Named Centaur killed him looted it cool can use on twink :)
▲ Page top
Hunting in SK
QuoteReply
# Feb 13 2003 at 6:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759706011
3 posts
I have hunted in SK on almost every character over level 20 I have ever played. In the days before LOIO this was the place to be and after years of paying I think I have figured out a bit on how the rares work.
First off you will only ever see 3 up at any one time max. Undead Clops, the named gnolls, centaurs, aviaks, ect. Now this was before they added some of the newer mobs but today me(lvl 58 bard) and my buddy (lvl 65 paladin) decided to go rare hunting. We got a total of 12 in 2 hours by killing everything in sight.
I am familiar with the rare pathing which triangualates around key positions, the well, the centaur village, aviak village and the undead spawn in front of the bridge to NK. I have killed Quilmane 5 times and looted 2 PFC's, and have seen all the reare except for Groi(troll).
Today was odd because this was the first time I had ever seen Thunderhoof and we killed him twice in the 2 hours got one each bow and quiver.
If your looking for the rares, kill all the roamers and have a tracker,good hunting.
▲ Page top
quivers
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2002 at 5:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782463914
1 post
Witch quivers can go into ammo slot? as this is actually useful. will any weight reducing bag containing arrows haste bow? if so makes non ammo slot quiver useless.
▲ Page top
RE: quivers
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 10:28 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591780131652
View User Forum
101 posts
As far as I know.. no quiver can be placed into the ammo slot, you put one arrow in the ammo slot & arrows of the same type will be drawn from a quiver, bag or inventory. Only a Quiver will cause haste, weight reduction bags won't.
▲ Page top
How to use...
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2002 at 4:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1709511381761
View User Forum
64 posts
Why is this good?
You put the quiver in your ammo slot, instead of simply puting a stack of arrows there. Or if you're like I was, you put 1 arrow in ammo and fill up a backpack full of stacks, then it just draws arrows from your backpack, which always keeps 1 arrow in your ammow slot.
This item frees up all those slots in a backpack, allowing you to put 80 arrows into your ammo slot by simply putting this quiver in ammo slot. Get it? Plus,it is 33% weight redux on the arrows, also improving your delay on your bow.
THAT'S how it's better.
▲ Page top
RE: How to use...
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 8:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341527836
Scholar
188 posts
Wrong. Quivers can not go into the ammo slot.
▲ Page top
SK Horses
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 2:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600042668010
4 posts
Both Kroldir and Coloth were in SK today. Kroldir
was northeast of centaur village and dropped the
quiver. Coloth was by the Avaiks. No one wanted to help me get him so he got away. Red to my lvl
28 druid. By the way,someone did help me when I
saw Quillimane by avaiks.Got the cloak. All three
spawned within an hour and a half. A good day for
hunting in SK.

Spatz Level 28 Druid
Saryn Server

We should all have such good hunting. Gratz on a truly unusual day.

Kroldir Thunderhoof
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 12:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757859631
13 posts
Found him today on my back to Paw, buck nekkid. Greed to me with my 35 Warrior, with a H2H of 6 or so, I figgered, "What the heck, I'll never see him again!" Went toe to hoof with him for a while, got him with 3/4 bub left, he dropped the Quiver. =)

# Jan 07 2002 at 12:55 AM Rating: Decent

13 posts

▲ Page top
Just a myth?
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2001 at 7:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766358568
15 posts
I have camped SK now for about 3 weeks..I have seen Quillmane three times, finally I couldn't resist and took him out. (Got the Pegasus Cloak btw, sorry mages) have seen Knari Morawk-rare, Coloth Meadowgreen several times, got help killing him and got some crappy 8/51 bow, have seen Synger Foxfyre, Marik Clubthorn and other rares...but I have NEVER even caught a glimpse of Kroldir Thunderhoof even on track...does this centaur still pop in SK? I have been tempted to whine to a GM but am holding out. Has anyone seen Kroldir, and if so, where does he spawn pls? I would really like the quiver for delay reduction on my Trueshot.
Lynnay Arbormist
36-Ranger
▲ Page top
RE: Just a myth?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 8:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766358568
15 posts
Just wanted to say I finally got tired of soloing giants in FM & decided to go back to SK, and there was my centaur on track! Piece of cake to take him out! Am now proud owner of a THUNDERHOOF QUIVER! Only took me a month & a half of realtime playing to get ), but worth it! Have runed oak bow & critical shot is up to 61, have incentive to keep working on archery now. FYI-loc I killed Thunderhoof at was n630, p1203 if anyone else if looking for him.
Signed,
One Happy Ranger!
Lynnay Arbormist-lvl 40
Tunare Server
Faithful Servant of Karana

# Nov 06 2001 at 12:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175401366

He does exist. You are going to hate this, but I never go to SK and decided to peek in today. Saw him on track and took him out. He dropped the quiver. Unfortunately, the quiver is now only four slots! :(
Maybe they nerfed it! On the picture above it says eight slots--not true. <grumble grumble>
I will send in a new pic to Allakhazam's. I wonder why they changed it?

Windsinger
Ranger of the 35th

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 13 2001 at 7:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have just started out a n00b ranger, he has the Trueshot among other items. I want this for him so he can handle more arrows, if anyone has one on Rodcet Nife. Please send a tell to either:
quivers

# Jul 30 2001 at 11:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361326788
1 post
Ahh quivers are the stuff reducing outr delay ad well the reduction helps but it being only 4 slot ins't specail a tailor made on eI have is 6 and 33% and later the Fleeting quiver tailor made beats that the skill in tailoring thou to make the fleeting quiver needs to be high like close to 200 so im told. it 8 slot and 33% and if any tailors are curious look up Eqtraders.com for rescipes

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 03 2001 at 2:10 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i got it!
RE: Whats So Spiffy?
QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 4:53 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
His post was in Dec.18th, 2000. So it was made before the new patch where quivers where made to reduce delay on bows. You posted the 22nd of may in 2001, like a week after that patch. The newer posts go on top and older ones on the bottom. So dont be quick to flame people.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 16 2001 at 1:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Also drops the Runed Oak Bow
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 5:13 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Kroldir Thunderhoof also drops the Runed Oak Bow(21/43, range 125. war,rng,pal,rog,shd) as his rare.

Lately I've seen several people offering 600 plat for the quiver, since the 33% weight reduction means this thing reloads arrows QUICKLY.
▲ Page top
RE: Doesn't drop the Runed Oak Bow
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 12:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752408613
10 posts
Correct Area.
Wrong Centaur.

The Runed Oak Bow does drop in South Karana; however, it can rarely be found on Coloth Meadowgreen. Coloth is higher level and fights a lot harder then Kroldir can think of as well as being highly resistant to Movement Adjustment spells for his level.
▲ Page top
RE: Doesn't drop the Runed Oak Bow
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 8:51 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Err he was correct.=)

The bow drop off BOTH of the centaurs, only it is an super rare drop off of Kroldir.

I know this is true is becauseby killing Kroldir is how I got my.=)

# May 08 2001 at 10:47 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
ok here's what's so special about this quiver...as of today's patch the wieght reduction on a quiver will reduce your delay time on your bow. this particular quiver has a 33% WR, which is pretty high if i'm not mistaken. i imagine poor thunderhoof is in for a camping event :) and i will see you there

Finneus Fulk <the Dedicated>
ranger of the glade

quiver

I just got this quiver today first time i seen the named centry in sk was fighting around paw and seen him on track and biening that i havent seen him before i took him out to see what he had he drop the quiver and yes it is only 4 slots but it is 33% waight redution so that makes it a bit better. Why it's good
QuoteReply
# Mar 28 2001 at 2:55 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Supposedly (I can't confirm this), this quiver can actually be placed in the range slot, thus freeing up the slot that a normal quiver would take up. <shrug>

# Mar 28 2001 at 3:00 PM Rating: Default

Anonymous

# Mar 27 2001 at 2:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i dont get it? why would you need a container that you can store stuff in? whats the purpose of this item?
▲ Page top
RE: what?
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2004 at 8:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261088139
36 posts
Honestly, I never flame on a board, but damn, you guys are dumb.

Quiver makes you shoot faster. Think about it. Which is better.... pulling arrows out of a quiver, or a damn backpack?

It is also rumored that if you put more arrows into a backpack of equal or greater weight reduction the haste will apply same as if they were in the quiver.

Read more posts on other quivers.
▲ Page top
Kroldir Thunderhoof
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2001 at 10:12 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just killed "Kroldir Thunderhoof", and he dropped the quiver. I have spent a lot of time in SK and have never seen this Centaur before, so I figured the quiver was a rare drop...but there doesn't seem to be anything special about it. If it is for a quest I have not yet read which one.
▲ Page top
Quiver
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2001 at 6:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756871234
2 posts
It drops off of K...something thunderfoot, in South Karana. He was high green to my 26th enchanter....it's pretty useless though since any container will draw arrows up to your ammo slot.
